name: Fried Horseradish Breaded Fish with Mashed Po
recipeInstructions:
1. Dry the fish fillets, sprinkle with salt and pepper, then lightly flour.
2. Combine horseradish and bread crumbs in a bowl.
3. In a separate bowl, lightly beat the eggs and add water until combined.
4. Dip only one side of each fillet first in the egg mixture, then coat with the bread crumb mixture.
5. Fry the fillets in batches in Puritan oil until golden brown on both sides.
6. For decorative chive oil, blend 1/4 cup oil and chopped chives in a blender.
7. Dry leeks on paper towels and fry in Puritan oil until tender.
8. Boil potatoes until tender, then drain and mash with butter until creamy.
9. Season mashed potatoes to taste with salt and pepper.
10. Place a serving of mashed potatoes on a plate.
11. Arrange the fried fish fillets on top.
12. Drizzle with chive oil and garnish with sliced leeks.
